# RealAIExamples LLM Index
> Actionable AI workflows for Sales, Marketing, and RevOps.

## Niche-Specific Indices (Recommended for Context)

- [llms-strategic-ops.txt](https://realaiexamples.com/llms-strategic-ops.txt) - 114 recipes

## Top Recipes
- [The Abandoned Cart SMS Writer](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/abandoned-cart-sms): Generate high-converting SMS hooks by analyzing your product page.
- [ABM Campaign Asset Builder](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/abm-campaign-asset-builder): Generate personalized landing page copy for target accounts.
- [Intent Signal Aggregator](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/abm-intent-aggregator): Combine G2, 6sense, and Website visits.
- [ABM Account Tiering Calc](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/abm-tiering-calculator): Auto-assign Tier 1/2/3 based on ICP fit and intent.
- [The About Page Storyteller](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/about-page-storyteller): Build trust with a data-backed brand story.
- [Corporate Hierarchy Builder](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/account-hierarchy-builder): Link subsidiaries to parents based on domain patterns.
- [Activation Rate by Cohort](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/activation-rate-cohort): Are new users activating faster?
- [Ad Copy Pivot Detector](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/ad-copy-benchmarker): Did they change their value prop?
- [The Ad Variant Factory](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/ad-copy-character-counter): Don't just count characters. Generate 10 high-CTR variants that fit perfectly.
- [The Conquest Campaigner](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/ad-counter-strike): Don't just attack their product. Attack their bad reviews.
- [Creative Fatigue Watchdog](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/ad-creative-fatigue-alert): Know when your ads stop working.
- [The Ad Frequency Capper](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/ad-frequency-capper): Stop annoying your prospects.
- [The Ad Library Archivist](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/ad-library-archivist): Build a structured swipe file from 100 links.
- [Ad Waste Excluder](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/ad-placement-exclusion-lister): Block mobile apps and kids' channels.
- [The Ad Spend Pacer](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/ad-spend-pacer): Land exactly on budget.
- [The Ad Visual Intelligence Factory](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/ad-visual-reverse-engineer): Reverse-engineer 10 winning ads into design briefs.
- [Advocacy Fatigue Saver](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/advocacy-ask-balancer): Don't ask twice in one month.
- [The Affiliate Program Launcher](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/affiliate-program-launcher): Build a commission-only sales team.
- [The Project Architect](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/agent-context-builder): Make any folder AI-ready instantly.
- [The AI Manager's Handbook](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/ai-manager-handbook): Teach AI your specific rules once.
- [The 'Alternative To' Hub Builder](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/alternative-to-builder): Steal traffic from all your competitors at once.
- [The API Fleet Monitor](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/api-endpoint-validator): Health check 50 endpoints in one run.
- [The API Key Rotator](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/api-key-rotator-checklist): Don't get hacked.
- [The API Usage Biller](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/api-usage-biller): Don't leave money on the table.
- [The App Store Screenshot Optimizer](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/app-store-screenshot-optimizer): More downloads, same traffic.
- [The Attribution Modeler](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/attribution-modeler): Who actually deserves credit?
- [Attribution Window Comparer](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/attribution-window-comparator): 1-day vs 7-day click impact.
- [The Audience Overlap Checker](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/audience-overlap-checker): Stop bidding against yourself.
- [Webinar Follow-Up Architect](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/automated-webinar-followup-sequence): Segment attendees vs. no-shows and write targeted nurture sequences.
- [The Autonomous Project Manager](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/autonomous-project-manager): The 'Ralph Wiggum' Loop.
- [The Sales Sniper](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/autonomous-sales-sniper): Find and qualify B2B leads automatically.
- [The AI Avatar Scriptwriter](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/avatar-video-producer): Scripts for HeyGen & Synthesia.
- [Backlink Quality Auditor](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/backlink-quality-scorer): Filter the gold from the spam.
- [The Backlink Toxicity Checker](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/backlink-toxicity-checker): Is that link helping or hurting?
- [Basket Correlation Engine](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/basket-analysis-market-basket): People who buy A also buy B.
- [Content Usage Tracker](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/battlecard-usage-tracker): Which battlecards do reps actually use?
- [Back-in-Stock Campaigner](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/bestseller-restock-alert): Launch ads when bestsellers return.
- [Beta Tester Verifier](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/beta-program-active-roster): Are they actually testing?
- [The Beta Tester Recruiter](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/beta-tester-recruiter): Find your first 50 users.
- [Billing Contact Verifier](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/billing-contact-verification): Will the invoice bounce?
- [Annual Pre-Pay Upsell](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/billing-frequency-upsell): Move monthly users to annual plans.
- [The Bio Link Architect](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/bio-link-optimizer): Optimize your 'Link in Bio' from a URL or a goal.
- [Content Revenue Attributor](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/blog-post-roi-calculator): Stitch CRM deals to Analytics data to find your 'Money Pages'.
- [The Blueprint Architect](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/blueprint-architect): Create your own Work-Ready blueprints.
- [The Boolean Search Architect](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/boolean-search-architect): Write complex Sales Nav queries without the headache.
- [The Event Booth Strategist](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/booth-design-checklist): Custom booth checklists for your event portfolio.
- [Event Lead Router](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/booth-scan-lead-router): Route badge scans to the right rep.
- [The Instant Brand Architect](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/brand-kit-gen): Logo + Pattern + Vibe.
- [The Brand Voice Architect](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/brand-voice-guidelines): Stop sounding schizophrenic.
- [Brand Voice Chameleon](https://realaiexamples.com/blueprints/brand-voice-rewriter): Rewrite any text to match your specific brand personality.
